label: APDS-9960 Light Sensor
info: Reads ambient light and color (RGBC) from an APDS-9960 every second. A function node computes an approximate lux value and normalizes red/green/blue as percentages of the clear channel. The debug panel shows formatted values. Cover the sensor with a hand to see values drop; expose to bright light to see them rise. Adjust the inject interval or add a chart node for live history.

name: compute lux
